title: Kilrock Mould Remover Spray 500ml - Eliminates Mould & Mildew - Removes Mould from Tiles, Walls, Ceilings, Bathrooms, Kitchens, Basements, Balconies, Saunas, Sheds, Plant Boxes and Garden Ornaments
features: BLEACH-POWERED MOULD REMOVAL - Fast-acting spray that destroys mould, mildew, and black mould from a variety of interior and exterior surfaces.
MULTI-SURFACE - Perfect for bathrooms, showers, kitchens, basements, windows, garden ornaments and more.
WORKS IN 20-30 MINUTES - Spray on, leave to work, then simply wipe away – for fast, visible mould removal results.
PROFESSIONAL STRENGTH CLEANING – Ideal for high-humidity areas, this powerful mould cleaner spray helps maintain hygienic, spotless surfaces.
SAFE FOR EVERYDAY USE - Suitable for most hard surfaces; for delicate materials, just test a small area before full application.
description: Kilrock Mold Spray Effectively removes mold and algae stains. Properties: Ideal for all indoor surfaces. in bathrooms, kitchens, cellars etc. Also on balconies, saunas, sheds, planters and garden ornaments. This professional formula has a bleaching effect. Prevents mold growth. Ready to use in a spray bottle For approx. 3 m² of wall or 8 m² of tiled surface. Content: 500 ml.
